name: Can I get paid while off work after twisting ankle on job?

mainEntity.name: Can I get paid while off work after twisting ankle on job?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, temporary total disability pays ~2/3 wages if doctor releases you from work.[2] Key factors: Physician approval; file claim.[1][2] Benefits start after 3-day wait in Utah.[1] Permanent cases get more.[2]
